content.problemStatement:
You're given three non-decreasing arrays AAA, BBB, CCC of length NAN_ANAŌĆŗ, NBN_BNBŌĆŗ, NCN_CNCŌĆŗ. We define,

f(i,j,k)=maxŌüĪ(ŌłŻAiŌłÆBjŌłŻ,ŌłŻBjŌłÆCkŌłŻ,ŌłŻAiŌłÆCkŌłŻ)f(i, j, k) = \max{(|A_i - B_j|, |B_j - C_k|, |A_i - C_k|)}f(i,j,k)=max(ŌłŻAiŌĆŗŌłÆBjŌĆŗŌłŻ,ŌłŻBjŌĆŗŌłÆCkŌĆŗŌłŻ,ŌłŻAiŌĆŗŌłÆCkŌĆŗŌłŻ) where 1ŌēżiŌēżNA,1ŌēżjŌēżNB,1ŌēżkŌēżNC1 \leq i \leq N_A, 1 \leq j \leq N_B, 1 \leq k \leq N_C1ŌēżiŌēżNAŌĆŗ,1ŌēżjŌēżNBŌĆŗ,1ŌēżkŌēżNCŌĆŗ

Find the **minimum** possible value of f(i,j,k)f(i, j, k)f(i,j,k) over all possible value of iii, jjj, kkk.

Note: Array AAA being non-decreasing means that A1ŌēżA2ŌēżŌŗ»ŌēżANA_1 \leq A_2 \leq \dots \leq A_NA1ŌĆŗŌēżA2ŌĆŗŌēżŌŗ»ŌēżANŌĆŗ.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NAN_ANAŌĆŗ, NBN_BNBŌĆŗ, NCN_CNCŌĆŗ ŌĆö the number of elements in the array AAA, BBB, CCC.
The second line of each test case contains NAN_ANAŌĆŗ space-separated integers A1,A2,ŌĆ”,ANAA_1,A_2,\ldots,A_{N_A}A1ŌĆŗ,A2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,ANAŌĆŗŌĆŗ ŌĆö the elements of array AAA.
The third line of each test case contains NBN_BNBŌĆŗ space-separated integers B1,B2,ŌĆ”,BNBB_1,B_2,\ldots,B_{N_B}B1ŌĆŗ,B2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,BNBŌĆŗŌĆŗ ŌĆö the elements of array BBB.
The fourth line of each test case contains NCN_CNCŌĆŗ space-separated integers C1,C2,ŌĆ”,CNCC_1,C_2,\ldots,C_{N_C}C1ŌĆŗ,C2ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,CNCŌĆŗŌĆŗ ŌĆö the elements of array CCC.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the **minimum** possible value of f(i,j,k)f(i, j, k)f(i,j,k).

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Minimum value will be f(3,1,1)=maxŌüĪ(ŌłŻ10ŌłÆ4ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ4ŌłÆ10ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ10ŌłÆ10ŌłŻ)=6f(3, 1, 1) = \max{(|10 - 4|, |4 - 10|, |10 - 10|)} = 6f(3,1,1)=max(ŌłŻ10ŌłÆ4ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ4ŌłÆ10ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ10ŌłÆ10ŌłŻ)=6.
Test case 222: Minimum value will be f(1,1,1)=maxŌüĪ(ŌłŻ5ŌłÆ10ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ10ŌłÆ25ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ25ŌłÆ5ŌłŻ)=20f(1, 1, 1) = \max{(|5 - 10|, |10 - 25|, |25 - 5|)} = 20f(1,1,1)=max(ŌłŻ5ŌłÆ10ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ10ŌłÆ25ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ25ŌłÆ5ŌłŻ)=20.
Test case 333: Minimum value will be f(4,2,2)=maxŌüĪ(ŌłŻ15ŌłÆ15ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ15ŌłÆ15ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ15ŌłÆ15ŌłŻ)=0f(4, 2, 2) = \max{(|15 - 15|, |15 - 15|, |15 - 15|)} = 0f(4,2,2)=max(ŌłŻ15ŌłÆ15ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ15ŌłÆ15ŌłŻ,ŌłŻ15ŌłÆ15ŌłŻ)=0.
